name: Empty State
purpose: Placeholder for zero-data, no-results, and first-run surfaces across console views.

structures.name: No Data
structures.notes: Neutral glyph in a muted circle, a short title, and a single primary action.

structures.name: No Results
structures.notes: Used after a filter or search returns nothing; suggests adjusting query.

structures.name: Error State
structures.notes: Destructive-tinted glyph; offers a retry action.

interactionNotes: Keep the glyph monochrome and quiet; the action carries the only emphasis.
Copy should state what is missing and the single best next step.
